历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 25977 → 23020 → 22192 → 22257 → 29828. From 2021 to 2024, it fluctuated narrowly within the 22000–26000 range. In 2025, it significantly dropped by about 7571 positions to 29828, the largest decline in recent years, possibly reflecting the cumulative impact of remote location on application willingness. The university's enrollment plan in Heilongjiang for Physics Category has been continuously expanding: 67 in 2021 → 69 in 2022 → 72 in 2023 → 88 in 2024 → 91 in 2025 → 93 in 2026. In 2026, it expanded by 2 students compared to 2025, an expansion rate of about 2.2%. The increase in enrollment slots has a slight pushing-back effect on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Petroleum (Beijing) Karamay Campus is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, sharing the academic level and disciplinary resources of China University of Petroleum (Beijing). In the Soft Science China University Rankings, the main campus ranked 62nd in 2026. The overall level of the university is relatively high, but the Karamay Campus is located in Xinjiang, which has regional differences from the main campus. There are no specific negative records in the reputation and public opinion files. Douyin popularity did not enter the top 100 overall, with generally low exposure. As a petroleum-focused institution, it has high industry recognition but limited social attention, with no obvious admission gaps or negative public opinion impacts.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core majors such as Petroleum Engineering and Oil & Gas Storage and Transportation Engineering are closely related to the energy industry. In recent years, energy and power majors have been recommended in terms of social popularity. General engineering majors like Computer Science and Automation are highly popular. In 2025, the number of Physics Category examinees in Heilongjiang was about 117,407. In 2026, the total number of examinees is about 167,000. Estimating the Physics Category proportion at about 68% in recent years, the number of Physics Category examinees in 2026 is about 113,560, a decrease of about 3,847 compared to 2025, slightly easing competition. The university is located in Karamay City, Xinjiang, far from Heilongjiang, and regional preferences have a certain inhibitory effect on the application willingness of Heilongjiang examinees. The university's enrollment proportion in Heilongjiang is about 2.2% (2025), making it a medium-to-small scale province in cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormal fluctuation of a significant ranking drop in 2025, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan, the slight decrease in local Physics Category examinees, and the remote location factor, it is expected that the 2026 ranking will slightly recover (ranking number decreases, competition slightly eases) based on the 2025 baseline. The predicted minimum ranking is about 30021, with a range of 29521–30521.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, you can focus on sprinting for core advantageous majors such as Petroleum Engineering and Computer Science.
